languages.text: "Я пришел вернуть микстуру, которую вы прописали моей дочери".

traits.locale_text: "Я пришел вернуть микстуру, которую вы прописали моей дочере".

languages.text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."
languages.original_text: "Я пришел вернуть микстуру, которую вы прописали моей дочери".

traits.locale_text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."
"I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."
"I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."

languages.text: 「娘のために処方された薬の混合液を返却しに来ました」
languages.original_text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."

languages.text: "Kızıma reçete ettiğiniz karışımı iade etmeye geldim."
languages.original_text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."

traits.locale_text: "Kızıma reçete ettiğiniz karışımı iade etmeye geldim."

languages.text: “我来退还你为我女儿调配的药剂。”
languages.original_text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."

traits.locale_text: “我来退还你为我女儿调配的药剂。”

languages.text: "Ich bringe die Mixtur zurück, die Ihr meiner Tochter verschrieben habt."
languages.original_text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."

traits.locale_text: "Ich bringe die Mixtur zurück, die Ihr meiner Tochter verschrieben habt."

languages.text: « Je vous rapporte le remède que vous avez prescrit à ma fille. »
languages.original_text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous rapporte le remède que vous avez prescrit à ma fille. »

languages.text: «Venía a devolver la mezcla que recetó a mi hija».
languages.original_text: "I've come to return the mixture you prescribed for my daughter."

traits.locale_text: «Venía a devolver la mezcla que recetó a mi hija».
